# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Prefix for VM names"
      }
    },
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Number of VMs to deploy"
      }
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin username for the VMs"
      }
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin password for the VMs"
      }
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_DS1_v2",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Size of the VMs"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "imageReference": {
      "publisher": "Canonical",
      "offer": "UbuntuServer",
      "sku": "18.04-LTS",
      "version": "latest"
    },
    "osDiskName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '_OSDisk')]",
    "dataDiskName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '_DataDisk')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vmNamePrefix')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "default",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/24"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '_nic', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "publicIpLoop",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "allocationMethod": "Dynamic"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '_nic', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vmNamePrefix'))]"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicLoop",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), 'subnets', 'default')]"
              },
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '_nic', copyIndex()))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmLoop",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '_nic', copyIndex()))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[variables('imageReference')]",
          "osDisk": {
            "name": "[variables('osDiskName')]",
            "createOption": "FromImage"
          }
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '_nic', copyIndex()))]"
            }
          ]
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "dataDisks": [
            {
              "name": "[variables('dataDiskName')]",
              "diskSizeGB": 128,
              "createOption": "Empty"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {}
}
